creator: jlmales@gmail.com
text:
At 16 October 2019 06:12:36 I used the XFCE DE "Suspend" function.  I did not click the "Suspend" button until the countdown time in the "Suspend" Dialogue widget reached 23 seconds.

bug #241267 was not in play for this XFCE session.

Other than only allowing 5 minutes from time the XFCE clock froze (expected as part of suspend process) at "2019-10-16 06:21:43+0000 UTC" the bug as described occurred and again using "poweroff", but this time as root on VTTY2.
